name: hCG Pregnancy Detection Kit
description: Clinically validated one-step urine pregnancy test with 99.9% accuracy. Results in 3 minutes. WHO-GMP certified. Detects hCG levels as low as 25 mIU/mL.
uses: Used for early detection of pregnancy at home with 99.9% clinical accuracy.
sideEffects: No direct side effects; incorrect testing procedure may lead to false results.
dosage: One-step urine test; follow package instructions carefully.
storage: Store between 2°C to 30°C. Do not freeze.

name: Rivakold Multi-Symptom Tablets
description: Triple-action relief for cold, flu, and sinus congestion. Non-drowsy formula for daytime use. Each blister contains 10 tablets.
uses: Treats common cold symptoms including headache, fever, nasal congestion, and sore throat.
sideEffects: May cause mild dizziness, dry mouth, or drowsiness in sensitive individuals.
dosage: 1 tablet every 4-6 hours. Do not exceed 4 tablets in 24 hours.
storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: RIVASYNE Anti-Fungal Cream
description: Dual-action antifungal and anti-inflammatory cream for skin infections, ringworm, and athlete's foot. Dermatologically tested. 20g tube.
uses: Treatment of fungal skin infections like athlete's foot, ringworm, and fungal diaper rash.
sideEffects: Mild skin irritation, redness, or burning sensation at the site of application.
dosage: Apply a thin layer to affected area twice daily for 2-4 weeks.
storage: Keep tube tightly closed. Store below 25°C.

name: Rivapro-ESR Probiotic Capsules
composition: Lactobacillus acidophilus 2 Billion CFU + Bifidobacterium 1 Billion CFU
description: Advanced gut health formula with 3 billion live cultures per capsule. Supports digestive health, immunity, and nutrient absorption. 30 capsules per pack.
uses: Used to maintain a healthy balance of gut bacteria and support overall digestive wellness.
sideEffects: Rare instances of mild bloating or gas during the first few days of use.
dosage: 1 capsule daily, preferably with a meal.
storage: Store in a cool, dry place. Refrigeration recommended after opening.

name: Rivadol-AP Pain Relief Tablets
description: Fast-acting triple-action pain relief for joint pain, muscular pain, and post-operative pain. Enteric-coated for stomach safety. 10 tablets per strip.

name: Rivasyne Gentle Face Wash
composition: Salicylic Acid 0.5% + Niacinamide 2% + Aloe Vera Extract
description: pH-balanced clinical face wash for acne-prone and sensitive skin. Removes 99% of bacteria without stripping natural moisture. Dermatologist tested. 100ml.

name: Rivaderm Skin Recovery Cream
description: Intensive repair cream for damaged, dry, and eczema-prone skin. Restores the natural skin barrier with 72-hour hydration. Fragrance-free formula. 50g.

name: Rivoxy Omega-3 Softgels
composition: EPA 360mg + DHA 240mg + Vitamin E 10mg per softgel
description: Pharmaceutical-grade fish oil with high EPA/DHA ratio for cardiovascular health, brain function, and inflammation reduction. Enteric-coated to prevent fishy aftertaste. 60 softgels.

name: Rivagluco Blood Sugar Monitor Kit
description: Clinical-grade blood glucose monitoring system with 5-second test time. Memory stores 500 readings with date/time. USB connectivity for data export. ISO 15197 certified.

name: Rivazith Azithromycin 500mg
description: Broad-spectrum macrolide antibiotic for respiratory, skin, and soft tissue infections. Z-pack format: 3 tablets per strip. Store below 30°C.

name: RivaC Vitamin C 1000mg Effervescent
description: High-potency immunity booster with effervescent delivery for maximum absorption. Orange flavour. Suitable for adults and children above 12. 20 tablets per tube.

name: Rivacare Hand Sanitizer 500ml
composition: Isopropyl Alcohol 70% v/v + Aloe Vera Gel
description: Hospital-grade hand sanitizer that kills 99.99% of germs in 15 seconds. Non-sticky, moisturizing formula with aloe vera. WHO-recommended formula. Pump dispenser.
